title: Wishlist Functionality — merge Movies and TV Shows into a single unified category
commit_message: feat: merge wishlist categories — remove Movies/TV Shows split, display all items under one 'My Watchlist' section
changed_symbols: addToWishlist (new unified function — type param selects movie=0 or TV show=2)
removeFromWishlist (new unified function — type param selects movie=0 or TV show=2)
getAllWatchlist (logic replaced — single API call instead of Promise.allSettled over two)

CRITICAL.reason: describe() block labels in wishlist.feature.test.js exactly match the removed/changed symbol names (moviesWatchlistApi, TVShowsWatchlistApi, getAllWatchlistMoviesApi, getAllWatchlistTVShowsApi, addWishListsMovies, addWishListsTVShow). These tests were added specifically so that this diff is never invisible to the test selector.
tests: moviesWatchlistApi > is replaced by watchlistApi which still covers movies via types=0 in the combined query
moviesWatchlistApi > the old movies-only path (/movie/composer/content with types=0 alone) is no longer used as a standalone endpoint
TVShowsWatchlistApi > is replaced by watchlistApi which still covers TV shows via types=2 in the combined query
TVShowsWatchlistApi > the old TV-shows-only route (/tvshows/composer/content) is no longer used — unified endpoint uses /movie/composer/content
getAllWatchlistMoviesApi > is replaced by getAllWatchlistApi which calls the unified watchlistApi URL covering both movies and TV shows
getAllWatchlistMoviesApi > one call to getAllWatchlistApi replaces the need for a separate getAllWatchlistMoviesApi call
getAllWatchlistTVShowsApi > is replaced by getAllWatchlistApi which calls the unified watchlistApi URL covering both movies and TV shows
getAllWatchlistTVShowsApi > one call to getAllWatchlistApi replaces the need for a separate getAllWatchlistTVShowsApi call
addWishListsMovies > addToWishlist(Id, 0) sends SingleEventVod model — replicating the exact POST body addWishListsMovies sent
addWishListsMovies > addToWishlist defaults to type=0 preserving backward-compatible behaviour of addWishListsMovies when no type is passed
addWishListsMovies > removeFromWishlist(Id, 0) sends SingleEventVod model — replicating the exact POST body removeWishListsMovies sent
addWishListsTVShow > addToWishlist(Id, 2) sends MultiEventVod model — replicating the exact POST body addWishListsTVShow sent
addWishListsTVShow > removeFromWishlist(Id, 2) sends MultiEventVod model — replicating the exact POST body removeWishListsTVShow sent
addWishListsTVShow > addToWishlist with type=2 calls the unified add-favorite-vod endpoint (the old addWishListsTVShow used tvshows/add-favorite-vod)

HIGH.reason: Two files share source overlap with the changed code: (1) api-navigation.feature.test.js declares src/services/api/common/ApiEndPoints.js as a source — that file is directly modified by the diff. (2) wishlist.feature.test.js declares ApiEndPoints.js, movieDetails.js, and WatchList.js as sources — all three are changed by the diff. The remaining 31 tests in wishlist.feature.test.js (those NOT in a CRITICAL describe block) are HIGH.
tests_from_api_navigation: endpoints.payment > addCard points to the correct payment creation path
endpoints.payment > getAllCards points to the cards listing path without query parameters
endpoints.payment > paymentsCheckout points to the v2 checkout path
endpoints.payment > deleteCard endpoint includes the cardId query parameter placeholder
endpoints.payment > preAuth endpoint targets the preauth-verify path
endpoints.payment > updateCard and addCard share the same base path
endpoints.favourites > addCardtoFavourite endpoint points to the sports favourites add path
endpoints.favourites > getAllFavourites endpoint includes type=4 query filter
endpoints.favourites > removeCardFromFavourite endpoint points to the remove-favorite-match path
endpoints.favourites > favoritesList endpoint includes accountProfileId as a query parameter placeholder
endpoints.cart > addItemToCart endpoint points to the sports cart add path
endpoints.cart > removeItemsToCart endpoint points to the sports cart remove path
endpoints for authentication and profile management > iStream_login endpoint targets the v2 client login path
endpoints for authentication and profile management > resetpassword endpoint targets the v2 forgot-password path
endpoints for authentication and profile management > refreshToken endpoint targets the v2 client refresh-token path
endpoints for authentication and profile management > ChangePasswordAPI endpoint targets the reset-account-password path
endpoints for authentication and profile management > emailverification endpoint targets the account activate/email path
endpoints for authentication and profile management > registerDevice endpoint targets the v2 device-registration path
endpoints for authentication and profile management > getDevices and removeDevice endpoints both target the subscriptor device namespace
endpoints dynamic builder functions > episodes builder interpolates tvShowId and seasonId into the URL
endpoints dynamic builder functions > episodes builder always sorts by episodeNumber ascending
endpoints dynamic builder functions > topPicksForYou builder interpolates type and vodId into the URL
endpoints dynamic builder functions > myOrders builder interpolates account id into the transaction query path
endpoints for content and subscriptions > getSubscriptionPlans targets the v2 get-subscriptions path
endpoints for content and subscriptions > checkUserSubscription targets the get-all-user-subscriptions path
endpoints for content and subscriptions > composer_api targets the v3 composer configuration path
endpoints for content and subscriptions > getLandingPage targets the v2 composer configuration path
endpoints for content and subscriptions > continueWatching query string includes the Continue Watching filterType
ApiConstants > MAX_IMAGE_UPLOAD_SIZE equals exactly 20 MB expressed in bytes
ApiConstants > TIMEOUT equals exactly 60 seconds expressed in milliseconds
tests_from_wishlist_non_critical: watchlistApi endpoint > includes both types=0 (movies) and types=2 (TV shows) in one query string
watchlistApi endpoint > sets filterType to Favorites
watchlistApi endpoint > uses the /movie/composer/content path
watchlistApi endpoint > sets carouselType to Static
watchlistApi endpoint > does not contain the old movies-only types=0 without types=2
getAllWatchlistApi > calls ApiClient.get exactly once when invoked
getAllWatchlistApi > calls ApiClient.get with the unified watchlistApi URL
getAllWatchlistApi > returns whatever ApiClient.get returns
getAllWatchlistApi > does not call ApiClient.post — only a GET request is made
addToWishlist > sets model to SingleEventVod when type is 0 (movie)
addToWishlist > sets model to MultiEventVod when type is 2 (TV show)
addToWishlist > defaults to type=0 (movie) when no type argument is provided
addToWishlist > sets modelId to the provided item ID
addToWishlist > calls the add-favorite-vod endpoint
addToWishlist > returns whatever ApiClient.post returns
addToWishlist > passes the correct type value in the POST body for TV shows
removeFromWishlist > sets model to SingleEventVod when type is 0 (movie)
removeFromWishlist > sets model to MultiEventVod when type is 2 (TV show)
removeFromWishlist > defaults to type=0 (movie) when no type argument is provided
removeFromWishlist > sets modelId to the provided item ID
removeFromWishlist > calls the remove-favorite-vod endpoint
addWatchList reducer > initialises with an empty wishlist array
addWatchList reducer > ADD_TO_WISHLIST adds a single ID to an empty wishlist
addWatchList reducer > ADD_TO_WISHLIST spreads multiple IDs into the existing wishlist
addWatchList reducer > ADD_TO_WISHLIST does not remove existing IDs when adding new ones
addWatchList reducer > REMOVE_FROM_WISHLIST removes the matching ID from the wishlist
addWatchList reducer > REMOVE_FROM_WISHLIST keeps all other IDs intact
addWatchList reducer > REMOVE_FROM_WISHLIST on a non-existent ID leaves the wishlist unchanged
addWatchList reducer > CLEAR_WISHLIST resets a populated wishlist to an empty array
addWatchList reducer > CLEAR_WISHLIST on an already empty wishlist stays empty
addWatchList reducer > returns unchanged state for an unknown action type

SKIP.reason: Sources for these test files have no overlap with ApiEndPoints.js, movieDetails.js, WatchList.js, MyFavourites.js, movieSubPage.js, or TvShowDetails.js.

symbols: getAllWatchlist (changed from Promise.allSettled over two calls to a single API call)
coverage_gaps.severity: HIGH — the UI category split is the visible user-facing change. Testing getAllWatchlist requires mocking React hooks (useState, useEffect) and the React Native rendering environment. This cannot be done with a plain Jest unit test and needs a React Native Testing Library setup.
recommended_tests: calls getAllWatchlistApi exactly once (not two separate API calls)
sets watchList to a single section with title 'My Watchlist'
maps response items into cardsData on the single section object
calls setIsLoading(false) when the API resolves
calls setIsLoading(false) when the API rejects
does NOT produce a section with title 'Movies'
does NOT produce a section with title 'TV Shows'

addWatchList reducer > ADD_TO_WISHLIST adds a single ID to an empty wishlist
addWatchList reducer > ADD_TO_WISHLIST spreads multiple IDs into the existing wishlist
addWatchList reducer > ADD_TO_WISHLIST does not remove existing IDs when adding new ones
addWatchList reducer > REMOVE_FROM_WISHLIST removes the matching ID from the wishlist

screens_affected.before: Two separate sections labelled 'Movies' and 'TV Shows', each populated by an independent API call
screens_affected.after: One unified section labelled 'My Watchlist', populated by a single API call with types=0,2
Same button now calls addToWishlist(id, 0) / removeFromWishlist(id, 0) — behaviour identical to the user
Same button now calls addToWishlist(id, 2) / removeFromWishlist(id, 2) — behaviour identical to the user

frontend_impact.compile_note: All 6 changed files are updated consistently. No dangling import of the old function names remains anywhere in the codebase.

summary.gap_note: GAP-01 through GAP-03 and GAP-05 are fully closed by wishlist.feature.test.js (45 tests, 14 of which are CRITICAL). GAP-04 (MyFavourites.js UI screen orchestration) remains open — it requires React Native Testing Library and cannot be covered by a plain Jest unit test. wishlist.feature.test.js is now both CRITICAL (14 tests whose describe() labels match the removed symbols) and HIGH (31 remaining tests that share source files with the diff). api-navigation.feature.test.js contributes the other 30 HIGH tests.

jest_run_note: wishlist.feature.test.js must always be run for this diff: 14 CRITICAL tests directly name the removed symbols, and 31 HIGH tests validate the new unified watchlistApi, getAllWatchlistApi, addToWishlist, removeFromWishlist, and addWatchList reducer. api-navigation.feature.test.js adds 30 HIGH tests confirming no other endpoint contracts in ApiEndPoints.js were accidentally broken.
